title: PS 5.1 + PS 7 Dual Parse Validation
description: After every code change, run parse check on both PowerShell 5.1 (powershell.exe) and PowerShell 7 (pwsh.exe). Script: temp/parse-check.ps1. Must return zero errors on both hosts before any commit.
notes: Routine: powershell.exe -NoProfile -File temp/parse-check.ps1 && pwsh -NoProfile -File temp/parse-check.ps1. Baseline: Session 6 passed both.
resolution: VERIFIED - PS5.1=0 PS7=0 parse errors. Fixed 8 missing BOM files.
